@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "nats-1921-add-support-to-leafnode-config-reload",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "nats: Add support to leafnode config reload",
+    "description": "Add support to leafnode config reload. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current nats deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your nats version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nhelm list -n nats 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working nats installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review nats configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant nats configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nkubectl get configmap -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=nats\n```\n## Feature Request\n\nIt would be useful to enable config reload for a few fields of a leafnode config, like the remotes which are not possible to prune right now:\n\n```\n[32903] 2021/02/17 1943.113029 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support to leafnode config reload",
+        "description": "Could you share your config before/after? I am not able to reproduce. Going from 0 remote to 1, I get this:\n```\n[35849] 2021/09/08 1744.457855 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={0.0.0.0 5223    [] 2 <nil> 2 false map[]  false 1s [] <nil> 0 0\n```yaml\n[32903] 2021/02/17 19:55:43.113029 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0xc0000d02d0] <nil> 0 0}, new={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0xc00028e090] <nil> 0 0}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n nats -l app.kubernetes.io/name=nats\nkubectl get events -n nats --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support to leafnode config reload\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Could you share your config before/after? I am not able to reproduce.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[32903] 2021/02/17 19:55:43.113029 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0xc0000d02d0] <nil> 0 0}, new={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0xc00028e090] <nil> 0 0}",
+        "[1098] 2021/08/02 03:02:04.624265 [DBG] Trapped \"hangup\" signal\n[1098] 2021/08/02 03:02:04.625114 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0x40000981b0] <nil> 0 0}, new={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0x40002e0870] <nil> 0 0}\n[1098] 2021/08/02 03:03:01.420350 [DBG] Trapped \"hangup\" signal\n[1098] 2021/08/02 03:03:01.421154 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0x40000981b0] <nil> 0 0}, new={ 0    [] 0 <nil> 0 false  false 1s [0x40001883f0] <nil> 0 0}\n[1098] 2021/08/02 03:03:01.421190 [DBG] 192.0.2.1:37837 - cid:19992 - Client Ping Timer\n[1098] 2021/08/02 03:03:01.421202 [DBG] 192.0.2.1:37837 - cid:19992 ",
+        "[35849] 2021/09/08 17:34:44.457855 [ERR] Failed to reload server configuration: config reload not supported for LeafNode: old={0.0.0.0 5223    [] 2 <nil> 2 false map[]  false 1s [] <nil> 0 0 <nil>}, new={0.0.0.0 5223    [] 2 <nil> 2 false map[]  false 1s [0xc000220140] <nil> 0 0 <nil>}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "nats",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "nats"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/issues/1921",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with nats installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:46:52.666Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
